_README: Shipped seed mappings between Reverb category UUIDs and eBay category IDs.
These pre-populate the category_mappings table on first run via the
suggestion engine's load_shipped_mappings(). Once loaded, they coexist
with learned mappings (recorded from Dad's actual Category saves).
All eBay category_id values below are TODO placeholders. Tomorrow once
we have eBay credentials and live taxonomy, replace 'ebay_id': null with
the verified leaf category IDs (visible via Settings -> eBay taxonomy
search). Reverb UUIDs should already be populated from this app's cached
taxonomy - if a Reverb UUID below is null, the Reverb category lookup
couldn't find the leaf and we'll resolve it tomorrow too.
- reverb_uuid: Reverb category leaf UUID, or null if unresolved
- ebay_id: eBay numeric category_id (leaf), or null until verified

mappings.label: Guitar Tuners (Tuning Machines)
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Tuning Pegs
mappings.notes: Dad's primary product category. Reverb calls them 'Tuning Heads'; eBay calls them 'Tuning Pegs'.

mappings.label: Guitar Pickups
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Pickups
mappings.notes: May need separate entries for Acoustic vs Electric vs Bass pickups depending on Dad's split.

mappings.label: Guitar Bridges
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Bridges & Saddles
mappings.notes: eBay combines bridges with saddles in one leaf.

mappings.label: Guitar Necks
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Necks

mappings.label: Guitar Bodies
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Bodies

mappings.label: Guitar Strings
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Strings

mappings.label: Guitar Knobs
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Knobs, Jacks, Switches
mappings.notes: eBay's leaf is broader (knobs + jacks + switches in one).

mappings.label: Guitar Pickguards
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Pickguards

mappings.label: Guitar Cases & Gig Bags
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Cases & Gig Bags

mappings.label: Guitar Straps
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Straps

mappings.label: Acoustic Guitars
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Acoustic Guitars
mappings.notes: Whole-instrument category, not a part. eBay requires more specific sub-listing fields.

mappings.label: Electric Guitars
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Electric Guitars

mappings.label: Bass Guitars
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Bass Guitars

mappings.label: Effects Pedals
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Effects Pedals
mappings.notes: Reverb has many sub-categories under Effects; map per pedal type later.

mappings.label: Amplifier Tubes
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Vintage Musical Instruments > Vintage Tubes
mappings.notes: eBay's tube category is in their Vintage section, which may not be the right fit. Verify tomorrow.

mappings.label: Picks
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Picks

mappings.label: Tuners (Electronic)
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Tuners
mappings.notes: Different from Tuning Machines - these are electronic tuners.

mappings.label: Capos
mappings.ebay_full_name: Musical Instruments & Gear > Guitars & Basses > Parts & Accessories > Capos
